name: TOFUTTI BRANDS INC
summary: Tofutti Brands Inc. develops, produces, and markets TOFUTTI brand plant-based, dairy-free frozen desserts and cheese products containing no butterfat, cholesterol, or lactose. Products include Better Than Cream Cheese, Better Than Sour Cream, Tofutti Cuties ice cream sandwiches, and premium TOFUTTI frozen desserts. All products are vegan, Kosher-parve certified, and sold in US supermarkets, health food stores, food service outlets, and approximately twelve foreign countries.
